pi_items.source: README.md line 9 'Image size < 400MB' and verifier.py lines 72-88 checking < 400MB
README.md line 10 'Second build (cached) completes in < 60 seconds' and verifier.py lines 93-109
Task description says 'docker run --rm -p 8000:8000' implying localhost:8000, but export_result.sh line 66 uses '-p 8001:8000' and line 69 checks 'http://localhost:8001/health'
setup_task.sh line 56 'su - ga' and setup_task.sh line 29 'chown -R ga:ga'
task.json description mentions 'Login: user ga, password password123'
verifier.py line 22 'PASS_THRESHOLD = 60' and task.json description says 'Pass threshold: 60 points'

privileged_info_summary: The docker_build_performance task is a synthetic Docker optimization exercise for AcmeCorp Analytics Service. The project directory is /home/ga/projects/analytics-service, and the optimized image must be tagged acme-analytics:optimized. Target optimization goals include: image size under 400MB (original is over 1GB), cached build under 60 seconds, .dockerignore file with meaningful content, and production image without dev dependencies (pytest, black, locust). The health endpoint is /health on the container's port 8000. Administrator credentials are user 'ga' with password 'password123'. Pass threshold is 60 points. NOTE: There is a discrepancy in health endpoint verification - the metadata and task description reference http://localhost:8000/health, but the actual verification code in export_result.sh tests http://localhost:8001/health using port 8001 on the host.
